step description: Mount the throttle_stop onto the side of the carburetor_body and secure it using a screwdriver and screws.
Insert the diaphragm into the top opening of the carburetor_body.
Place the spring into the center of the diaphragm inside the carburetor_body.
Position the cover over the spring and secure it to the top of the carburetor_body with a screwdriver and screws.
Attach the float_bowl to the bottom of the carburetor_body assembly using a screwdriver and screws.
